  • Uses of MessageFilterI in fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.application.meteo

    Methods in fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.application.meteo that return MessageFilterI
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static MessageFilterI
    MeteoFilters.alertWithLevelAtLeastByName(String minimumLevelName)
    Filter accepting alerts whose MeteoProperties.LEVEL is at least the provided minimum (string-comparison on the level name; works because MeteoAlertI.Level names are alphabetically meaningful for the existing demo, but callers should prefer MeteoFilters.atLeastAlertLevel(fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.meteo.MeteoAlertI.Level) when comparing on the enum directly).
    static MessageFilterI
    MeteoFilters.anyAlert()
    Filter accepting any meteo alert message.
    static MessageFilterI
    MeteoFilters.anyWind()
    Filter accepting any wind message regardless of position.
    static MessageFilterI
    MeteoFilters.atLeastAlertLevel(MeteoAlertI.Level minimum)
    Convenience overload taking the MeteoAlertI.Level enum.
    static MessageFilterI
    MeteoFilters.windWithinDistance(PositionI reference, double maxDistance)
    Filter accepting wind messages whose MeteoProperties.PAYLOAD is within maxDistance of reference.

  • Uses of MessageFilterI in fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.base.components

    Methods in fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.base.components with parameters of type MessageFilterI
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    Broker.modifyFilter(String receptionPortURI, String channel, MessageFilterI filter)
    Modify the subscription filter of receptionPortURI on channel.
    void
    PluginClient.modifyFilter(String channel, MessageFilterI filter)
    Remplace le filtre actif sur channel par filter.
    void
    Broker.subscribe(String receptionPortURI, String channel, MessageFilterI filter)
    Subscribe receptionPortURI to channel with filter.
    void
    Client.subscribe(String channel, MessageFilterI filter)
    Souscrit à channel avec le filtre filter.
    void
    FullClient.subscribe(String channel, MessageFilterI filter)
    Souscrit au canal donné avec le filtre fourni.
    void
    PluginClient.subscribe(String channel, MessageFilterI filter)
    Souscrit ce client au canal channel avec le filtre filter (qui peut être null pour « accepter tout »).
    void
    SubscriberClient.subscribe(String channel, MessageFilterI filter)
    Souscrit au canal donné avec le filtre fourni (action métier appelée depuis les étapes du scénario).

  • Uses of MessageFilterI in fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.messages

    Classes in fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.messages that implement MessageFilterI
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    MessageFilter
    La classe MessageFilter implémente MessageFilterI pour filtrer les messages livrés par le système de publication/souscription.
    Methods in fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.messages that return MessageFilterI
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static MessageFilterI
    MessageFilter.acceptAll()
    Return a singleton message filter that accepts every message.

    Class
    Description

    AcceptAllMessageFilter
    Singleton MessageFilterI accepting every message.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

Bogdan Styn, Setbel Mélissa — Sorbonne Université, 2026
